steps.action: Probe the canonical accounting provenance surfaces on the compose-backed runtime as `uat.admin@example.com` in `MOCK`.
steps.expected: Authenticated users with admin authority can reach journal list and transaction-detail surfaces that expose provenance-oriented fields.
steps.observed: `POST /api/v1/auth/login` returned 200. `GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions?page=0&size=20` returned 200 with 14 entries. `GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions/1` returned 200 and the payload exposed provenance fields including `drivingDocument`, `linkedDocuments`, `eventTrail`, accounting-period metadata, and journal line detail. `GET /api/v1/accounting/journals?page=0&size=20` also returned 200 with 14 posted/reversed journal rows.

steps.action: Run targeted provenance coverage: `cd /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/erp-domain && MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest='BusinessDocumentTruthsTest,InvoiceServiceTest,PurchaseInvoiceEngineLifecycleTest,PurchasingServiceGoodsReceiptTest,AccountingAuditTrailServiceTest,InventoryAccountingEventListenerIT' test`.
steps.expected: Mission-scoped accounting detail coverage proves posted purchase-invoice journals resolve back to driving business documents and linked references.
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; 35 tests ran with 0 failures. `AccountingAuditTrailServiceTest` passed 6/6, including the purchase-invoice provenance case that asserts `drivingDocument.documentType == PURCHASE_INVOICE` and that the linked reference chain contains `GOODS_RECEIPT`, `PURCHASE_ORDER`, and `ACCOUNTING_ENTRY`.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 35, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Document status and accounting status stay separate

steps.action: Run the same targeted truth-lifecycle suite and inspect the returned lifecycle DTO assertions.
steps.expected: Commercial/workflow state remains distinct from accounting state for source orders, goods receipts, invoices, and purchases.
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; `BusinessDocumentTruthsTest.salesOrderLifecycle_staysNotEligibleBeforeInvoiceOrJournalTruthExists` passed with workflow `READY_TO_SHIP` and accounting `NOT_ELIGIBLE`. `InvoiceServiceTest.getInvoice_sourceOrderReferenceStaysNotEligibleBeforePostingTruthExists` passed with the linked `SOURCE_ORDER` lifecycle still `NOT_ELIGIBLE`. `PurchasingServiceGoodsReceiptTest.createGoodsReceipt_doesNotPostApJournalOnSuccessfulReceipt` kept the goods receipt at workflow `PARTIAL` and accounting `PENDING`, while `PurchaseInvoiceEngineLifecycleTest` confirmed posted purchase invoices surface workflow/accounting `POSTED/POSTED`.

steps.action: Inspect the shared lifecycle DTO and mapping helpers.
steps.expected: The user-facing DTO surface carries both workflow and accounting states explicitly rather than collapsing them into one field.
steps.observed: `DocumentLifecycleDto` is a two-field DTO (`workflowStatus`, `accountingStatus`) and is wired into invoice, goods-receipt, purchase, and accounting audit responses through `BusinessDocumentTruths` and `PurchaseResponseMapper`.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 35, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Posting truth has one canonical trigger per workflow

steps.action: Run the targeted duplicate-posting and linkage suite.
steps.expected: GRN remains stock-only, purchase invoice becomes the AP truth boundary, and replay/listener redelivery cannot create duplicate journals.
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; `PurchasingServiceGoodsReceiptTest.createGoodsReceipt_doesNotPostApJournalOnSuccessfulReceipt` passed and explicitly verifies no AP journal is posted at receipt time. `PurchaseInvoiceEngineLifecycleTest` passed while linking the receipt movement to the purchase journal only at invoice creation. `InventoryAccountingEventListenerIT` passed 5/5 and logged `Journal entry INV-MOVE-TEST-1-652b7b2b238c2e12 already exists, skipping duplicate`, confirming duplicate listener delivery is short-circuited instead of creating overlapping truth.

steps.action: Cross-check the canonical runtime audit surface.
steps.expected: User-facing accounting transaction queries remain available for the canonical posting path.
steps.observed: `GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions?page=0&size=20` returned 200 on the compose-backed runtime, confirming the canonical audit surface is available for posted journal review even though the seeded runtime does not preload linked GRN/purchase chains.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 35, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Linked reference chain is navigable end-to-end

steps.action: Run the targeted linked-reference suite across invoice, purchase, goods-receipt, and accounting audit services.
steps.expected: Touched O2C/P2P DTOs expose a navigable linked-reference chain from source documents through posting artifacts.
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; `InvoiceServiceTest` passed with invoice DTO linked references containing `SOURCE_ORDER`, `DISPATCH`, and `ACCOUNTING_ENTRY`. `PurchaseInvoiceEngineLifecycleTest` passed with purchase-invoice linked references containing `PURCHASE_ORDER`, `GOODS_RECEIPT`, and `ACCOUNTING_ENTRY`. `AccountingAuditTrailServiceTest` passed with the transaction-detail linked reference chain containing `GOODS_RECEIPT`, `PURCHASE_ORDER`, and `ACCOUNTING_ENTRY` for the posted purchase journal. `PurchasingServiceGoodsReceiptTest` also verified goods-receipt responses retain linked purchase-order references while remaining pre-AP posting.

steps.action: Check the canonical runtime audit-detail response shape.
steps.expected: The live API should expose transaction detail fields that can carry linked reference chain data for real posted documents.
steps.observed: `GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions/1` returned 200 with provenance-oriented keys including `drivingDocument`, `linkedDocuments`, `eventTrail`, and journal line detail. The seeded `MOCK` dataset did not include a prebuilt linked invoice/GRN/purchase chain, so targeted tests supplied the end-to-end document-link evidence.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 35, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

frictions.description: Launching the dedicated `user-testing-flow-validator` Task droid failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high-pro`.
frictions.resolution: Completed the assigned flow validation directly in-session and wrote the expected flow artifact manually, per mission guidance for subagent-launch failures.

frictions.description: The compose-backed `MOCK` runtime did not preload linked invoice/GRN/purchase chains needed for end-to-end workflow-truth probes.
frictions.resolution: Used live login and accounting API probes for surface availability, then relied on focused Maven service/truth tests for linked-reference and canonical-posting evidence. Updated `.factory/library/user-testing.md` to document this constraint.

frictions.description: The legacy `/api/v1/accounting/audit-trail` endpoint returned `500 SYS_001` on the current `MOCK` runtime during API discovery.
frictions.resolution: Switched to the canonical `/api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions` and `/api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions/{journalEntryId}` endpoints, which returned 200, and documented that testing preference in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

summary: Validated the four truth-rails user-testing assertions assigned from completed feature fulfills. Live API probes confirmed the current-code runtime and canonical accounting audit surfaces were reachable with seeded UAT credentials, while focused Maven suites (35 tests, 0 failures) supplied the decisive evidence for provenance, workflow/accounting state separation, canonical posting ownership, and linked-reference navigation across touched O2C/P2P truth boundaries.
